```python
import re
def parse_log(s):
    s = s.replace(' at ','at ')
    s = s.replace(' from ','from ')
    s = s.replace(' at Sun ','at Sun ')
    s = s.replace(' from ','from ')
    s = re.sub(r'\b\w+\b', '<*>', s)
    return s
```
